agents.name: requirement-agent
agents.description: Transforms JIRA user stories into finalized requirements documents

agents.name: architecture-agent
agents.description: Transforms finalized requirements into comprehensive system architecture designs

agents.name: design-review-agent
agents.description: Comprehensive design review of system architecture before development

agents.name: implementation-planning-agent
agents.description: Transforms approved architecture into detailed, dependency-ordered implementation plan

agents.name: implementation-agent
agents.description: Transforms implementation plan into production-ready code with human approval loops

agents.name: review-agent
agents.description: Comprehensive code review and quality assurance before PR creation

agents.name: verify-agent
agents.description: Verification and quality assurance with comprehensive testing suite

agents.name: pr-agent
agents.description: Automatic Pull Request creation and merging to complete SDLC cycle

orchestrator.name: orchestrator
orchestrator.description: Main entry point orchestrator for To-Do-App SDLC pipeline - routes requests to appropriate agents
